title: Standardized Property Data Schema
description: Schema for property data after column standardization (based on preprocessing.py COLUMN_MAPPING)

id.description: Property identifier (standardized from: id, property_id, prop_id, reference, ref_number)

uprn.description: Unique Property Reference Number (standardized from: uprn, unique_property_reference, property_reference)

address.description: Property address (standardized from: address, full_address, property_address, street_address)

city.description: City or town (standardized from: city, town, locality)

postcode.description: UK postcode (standardized from: postcode, post_code, zip_code, postal_code)

buildYear.description: Year built (standardized from: buildyear, build_year, year_built, construction_year, built)

type.description: Property type (standardized from: type, property_type, dwelling_type, house_type)

tenure.description: Tenure type (standardized from: tenure, ownership, tenancy_type)

landlord.description: Landlord name (standardized from: landlord, owner, landlord_name, housing_provider)

epcRating.description: EPC rating (standardized from: epcrating, epc_rating, epc, energy_rating, energy_performance)

lastClaimDate.description: Last claim date (standardized from: lastclaimdate, last_claim_date, lastclaim, previous_claim, last_claim, claim_date, most_recent_claim)

claimFrequency.description: Claim frequency (standardized from: claimfrequency, claim_frequency, number_of_claims, claims_count)

riskBand.description: Risk band (standardized from: riskband, risk_band, risk_level, risk_category, risk_rating)
